_note: Strict, recipe-owned spec read by c-eval-runner. A brand may layer brand-overrides/<slug>/acceptance.json to TIGHTEN thresholds (same id wins; new ids appended). See cfw-skills-pack/docs/skills-audit.md §4.

checks.desc: (a) No overlapping or jumbled text — one beat's text visible at a time, beats are strictly sequential.
(b) Graphics beats show a brand motion graphic (not a photo or blank rectangle); b-roll beats show real footage scaled-to-cover with no black bars.
(c) Text is legible at mobile size — 60px+ headlines, AA contrast, no tiny or illegible copy.
(d) Brand colors are correct per the Visual Identity Gate — not defaulted to white-on-black or any non-brand palette.
(e) No □ tofu boxes anywhere — all icons are inline SVG or CSS, zero unicode glyphs that the headless renderer cannot resolve.
(f) Ghost glyph on every graphics beat is a thematic number or single letter (beat index, listicle total, or deliberate initial) — never a placeholder word like 'CTA', 'TITLE', or 'HEADER'.
(g) FOREGROUND HERO is present and dominant on every graphics beat — bright headline + animated diagram/chart/checklist visible, not a ghost-glyph-only frame.
(h) Brand outro appears at approximately the final 3% of the reel (brand name + CTA, not a content beat).
(i) Cover freeze at t≈0 shows the money-shot — not a black frame or hook-animation blank.
